code:
import io
import string

fn add_if_even(_ current: Int, _ tok: String) -> Int
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    if v % 2 == 0
      current + v
    else
      current
    end
  when None
    current
  end
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
mut start = 0 - 1

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
        sum = add_if_even(sum, tok)
        start = 0 - 1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if start >= 0
  let tok = string.substring(input, start, n)
  sum = add_if_even(sum, tok)
end

println("sum_even=#{sum}")
